{"id":"smallhold-dt9","title":"Instance metadata: v1 and v2 endpoints, report version 4.x","description":"Return instance metadata. v2 is preferred by newer clients, v1 by older ones. Report version 4.0.0 (not the actual smallhold version) to maximize client compatibility — clients gate features on version. Include correct configuration.statuses.max_characters from config.

Agent workflow: Spawn a research subagent to fetch both endpoints from mastodon.social and document field differences between v1 and v2 as the oracle.

Test discipline: both endpoints return valid JSON with correct shapes validated against mastodon.social oracle; version field is 4.0.0 in both; max_toot_chars matches config value; openRegistrations is false; v2 configuration.media_attachments.supported_mime_types lists only images (no video). Never use implementation as its own oracle.

Defensive programming: contact_account returns null rather than leaking a persona name; do not return backend technical details (database type, OS) in any field; no .unwrap() outside tests; all errors Result<T, AppError>.","acceptance_criteria":"v1 and v2 return correct shapes matching mastodon.social oracle; version is 4.0.0; max_toot_chars from config; openRegistrations false; contact_account null; no internal technical details in response","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-04-23T00:32:40Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-04-23T00:32:40Z","metadata":{},"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-2io","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T17:32:42Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
